steps.note: Write acceptance criteria first. Each criterion maps to a test case.

steps.message: Review spec.md â€” verify every acceptance criterion is independently testable. Approve?

steps.note: Decompose into TDD tasks: each task starts with writing a failing test.

steps.message: Review tasks.md â€” verify each task begins with a RED test step. Approve?

steps.note: For each task: RED (write failing test) â†’ GREEN (minimal impl) â†’ REFACTOR (clean up).
Verify all tests pass, coverage meets threshold, and no regressions.
